raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A wooden cutting board is on a table. An orange is on the cutting board. A knife is on the table to the right of the cutting board. The orange is a solid, round object; the knife has a blade and a handle. STRATEGY - First, grasp the orange to move it to a position suitable for chopping. Then, grasp the knife to perform the chopping action. Failure modes include dropping the orange or knife, or misaligning the knife with the orange. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the orange on the cutting board. Step 2: Grasp the orange to pick it up. Step 3: Transport the orange to a central position on the cutting board. Step 4: Grasp the knife from the table. Step 5: Transport the knife to the orange. Step 6: Insert the knife into the orange and perform a chopping motion. Step 7: Release the knife and the orange.
Goal: chopped(orange)
Scene: cutting_board, orange, knife, table
Step 1: reach(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, orange, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, orange) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: holding(orange) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange)
Step 3: transport(orange -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: a central area on the cutting board
  spatial: on(orange, cutting_board) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange)
  done_when: on(orange, cutting_board)
Step 4: grasp(knife)
  affordance_region: the handle of the knife
  contact: holding(knife) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(knife)
Step 5: transport(knife -> orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  spatial: near(knife, orange) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(knife)
  done_when: near(knife, orange)
Step 6: insert(knife -> orange)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the orange
  contact: knife_contact(orange) [completion]
  pose: knife_angle(orange) [completion]
  done_when: knife_contact(orange)
Step 7: release(knife)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: released(knife) [completion]
  done_when: released(knife)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: a central area on the cutting board
the top surface of the orange
